message:
feat(search): add deterministic search query suggestion engine

Add SearchSuggestion type and search_query_suggestions() function for
CLI/TUI autocomplete of FTS queries.

- SearchSuggestion struct with text and optional description
- SearchSuggestionTemplate array with 13 built-in suggestions covering
  common patterns (error, warning, panic, usage/rate limit, approval,
  compaction) and FTS5 syntax helpers (AND, OR, NOT, quoted phrases,
  prefix wildcards, column-scoped searches)
- search_query_suggestions() matches by prefix on the last whitespace-
  delimited token; falls back to substring matching when no prefix
  matches are found; respects caller-provided limit
- search_suggestion_prefix() helper extracts the active token from the
  query string for incremental matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
